message:
fix: rename toon_rust dependency to tru to match upstream crate rename

The toon_rust repository renamed its crate from `toon_rust` to `tru`
(commit 9347178). This broke dependency resolution since the old
package name no longer exists at HEAD of the repo.

Changes:
- Workspace Cargo.toml: toon_rust -> tru dependency name
- pt-core/Cargo.toml: toon_rust -> tru workspace reference
- pt-core source and tests: use tru:: instead of use toon_rust::
- Cargo.lock: regenerated with tru v0.1.3

The release workflow already includes aarch64-apple-darwin target
for macOS Apple Silicon builds. The binary name `pt` conflict with
the_platinum_searcher is a known Homebrew namespace issue unrelated
to the build — users can install to a custom path via DEST= env var.

Fixes #1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
